block_00: IQ Broker iOS app for new traffic
block_02: Please be advised that due to technical reasons, the iOS version of the IQ Option app will soon be temporarily unavailable for new users from non-regulated countries.
block_03: Therefore, all the affiliate traffic needs to be directed to our alternative IQ Broker iOS app. Please, update your iOS links and mobile banners before December 18. The links to the new app are available in the Promo section.
block_06: Important: if you are using the universal link for iOS and Android, you do not need to update anything. In this case, the universal link will automatically send your iOS users to the new app.
block_08: the list of countries we accept traffic from
block_09: to make sure the IQ Option iOS app is available for the chosen geo. For example, the alternative app is available for installation in Vietnam and Indonesia, unlike the old one.
block_10: Hurry up to update the links before long and contact your manager if you need help.
